mappings.reason: CIS 1.1 explicitly inventories all enterprise assets with the potential to store or process data, a scope that encompasses information systems; this qualifies as a superset match under the Rule 13 exception and Rule 3 for an information systems inventory CCF control.

Maintaining an inventory of authentication and authorization systems is a typed system-level subset of the broader information systems inventory required by AM-01 — same inventory action, narrower scope, valid cross-domain PARTIAL under Rule 3.
